column1: Ozzie Albies stands out as the top pick, riding a strong recent stretch and hitting safely in nearly 80% of games, with a favorable platoon edge against Kyle Freeland and a significant park boost. Freddie Freeman offers solid reliability in the two-hole with a similar matchup advantage, though his recent hit rate trails Albies. Ildemaro Vargas brings upside from the eighth spot but lacks the same consistency, while Matt Olson and Otto Lopez round out the list with steady but less compelling profiles.
